<|12.74|> who charms and cherishes us<|16.16|>
<|16.16|> in ways we can't even imagine.<|18.44|>
<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> May we never, ever forget how much all that we are is loved, and loved unconditionally.<|7.62|>
<|8.44|> And in those moments that we do forget, let's come back to this altar, back to this table, so that we may remember.<|18.10|>
